title: tephroseris pyroglossa
intro: Tephroseris pyroglossa, also known as the Fire-leaved tephroseris, is a plant species within the daisy family native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephroseris pyroglossa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
